false_confuser_interpretation.interpretation: SAM2 and CoTracker have lower overall false-confuser rates than STWM; STWM only improves over Cutie overall and over CoTracker on selected continuity subsets.

STWM_vs_CoTracker_long_gap.interpretation: STWM has significant long-gap advantage over CoTracker.

STWM_vs_CoTracker_occlusion.interpretation: STWM has significant continuity-heavy occlusion advantage over CoTracker.

STWM_vs_SAM2_long_gap.interpretation: STWM is numerically slightly above SAM2 on long-gap but not significant.

STWM_weakness_OOD_vs_SAM2.interpretation: SAM2 is significantly stronger on OOD_hard.

STWM_weakness_crossing_vs_SAM2.interpretation: SAM2 is much stronger on crossing/ambiguity.

overall_ranking.interpretation: below SAM2/CoTracker overall, above Cutie and internal baselines
weaker than STWM overall on this protocol but not dramatically

paper_writing_implication: Do not claim STWM is external overall SOTA.
Do not hide that SAM2 and CoTracker are stronger overall.
Claim STWM continuity-heavy trace-belief advantage, especially against CoTracker on occlusion/long-gap.
Frame external baselines as strong comparison that clarifies the boundary of STWM, not as defeated weak baselines.
